let _seq=0;/**
 * Generates a unique, sequential message ID.
 * @param {'user'|'assistant'|'error'} role
 * @returns {string}
 */export function generateMessageId(){let role=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'msg';return"".concat(role,"_").concat(Date.now(),"_").concat(++_seq);}/**
 * Formats a timestamp for the message meta bar.
 * Delegates to Intl for locale-aware output.
 * @param {Date|string} value
 * @returns {string}
 */export function formatTime(value){const d=value instanceof Date?value:new Date(value);if(Number.isNaN(d.getTime()))return'';return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}).format(d);}/**
 * Strips leading markdown heading characters for display purposes.
 * @param {string} text
 * @returns {string}
 */export function stripHeadings(text){return text.replace(/^#{1,6}\s+/gm,'');}/**
 * Counts words in a string.
 * @param {string} text
 * @returns {number}
 */export function wordCount(text){return text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;}
